Week 3 is live: Week 3 Pre-Draw Edition

Pre-draw edition for 20-26 April 2026 . Week 3 moves to a standalone Madrid ATP Masters 1000 slate, which changes the build entirely: deep-run equity matters more, the altitude keeps ace upside relevant, and the edge comes from identifying which elite names can convert Monte-Carlo form into another deep run once the Madrid bracket lands.

Bonus Ball board: Carlos Alcaraz, Jannik Sinner, Alexander Zverev.
